examples: The good: a stunning exterior and beautiful coachwork mark the 2009 Aston Martin DB9 Volante.
This dates to a time when coachwork meant horse-and-buggy stuff, not cars.
In fact, the Duesenberg Model J fairly blows away most cars in history, whether you judge its coachwork, engineering, or sheer presence.
It was assembled featuring the classic V12 engine, a de Dion rear axle and right-hand drive, and it has pontoon-fender coachwork done by Scaglietti.
